대표님, Cisco (CSCO) Q2 FY2026 실적은 revenue $15.3~15.35억 (consensus $15.11~15.42억, +1.49% beat), non-GAAP EPS $1.04 (consensus $1.02, +1.96% beat), GAAP EPS $0.80로 consensus 상회. YoY revenue +10%, non-GAAP EPS +11%.

Q3 guidance: revenue $15.4~15.6억, non-GAAP EPS $1.02~1.04 (기존 대비 상향 추정치 초과 이행). FY2026 전체: revenue $61.2~61.7억, GAAP EPS $3.00~3.08.

Management: "Double-digit growth 초과, AI orders $2B 폭증, dividend 2% 인상 $0.42, RPO $43.4억 (+5%)" 강조. Gross margin 67.5% (non-GAAP), operating margin 34.6% 상회.

Stock reaction: after-hours 7% 하락 (AI 수요 강세에도 gross margin 우려).

Analyst: 24시간 내 upgrades/downgrades 데이터 없음.
